name: caddy-cloudflare
why: xcaddy build with Cloudflare DNS plugin for ACME DNS-01 wildcard certs
remove_when: never — Cloudflare DNS plugin is not in upstream Caddy
test_commands: cd test && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && bash test-caddy-routing.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
uv run --with pytest --with requests -- python -m pytest test/test_custom_images.py -m caddy_cloudflare -v

name: cadvisor
why: v0.56.2 fixes Docker 29+ crash but isn't published as a container image
test_commands: uv run --with pytest --with requests -- python -m pytest test/test_custom_images.py -m cadvisor -v

name: mcp-git
why: Custom Dockerfile with git+ssh deps and Docker secret injection entrypoint
remove_when: upstream publishes an official Docker image with HTTP transport
test_commands: uv run --with pytest --with requests -- python -m pytest test/test_custom_images.py -m git_mcp_server -v

name: mcp-auth-proxy
why: Patched build — VARCHAR(255) fix for session storage (sigbit/mcp-auth-proxy#111)
remove_when: upstream merges the VARCHAR fix and publishes a new release
test_commands: uv run --with pytest --with requests -- python -m pytest test/test_custom_images.py -m mcp_auth_proxy -v

name: pr-reviewer
why: AI PR reviewer with Claude/Gemini/Codex CLIs + GitHub CLI
test_setup: pip install -q uv && sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y -qq ripgrep
test_commands: docker run --rm $IMAGE_REF sh -c "claude --version && gh --version && gemini --version && codex --version"
docker run --rm $IMAGE_REF python3 -c "import yaml, json, subprocess, pathlib; print('imports OK')"
uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with httpx --with grep-ast --with tree-sitter-language-pack -- python -m pytest pr-reviewer/tests/ -v

name: semaphore
why: Semaphore UI + homelab tools (sops, age, dig, curl, jq, rsync) for Ansible playbooks
remove_when: never — homelab tooling layer is always needed on top of upstream
test_commands: docker run --rm --platform linux/arm64 $IMAGE_REF sh -c "sops --version && age --version && dig -v 2>&1 && curl --version | head -1 && jq --version && rsync --version | head -1 && just --version && uv --version && tailscale version && docker --version"

name: dagu-ops
why: Dagu operations scheduler + restic + rclone + Docker CLI for homelab automation
remove_when: never — ops tooling layer is always needed on top of Dagu
test_commands: docker run --rm $IMAGE_REF sh -c "dagu version && restic version && rclone version | head -1 && docker --version && ssh -V 2>&1 && curl --version | head -1"

name: mcp-substack
why: Custom MCP server — no existing Substack MCP supports authenticated subscriber content
remove_when: never — custom server wrapping substack-api library
